zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Bingham於1230年之後出生在英國多瑟特梅爾可姆 雷吉時，他的父親Bishop Robert Bingham8835歲，母親Lucy Turberville8805歲。他於大約1260年與Emma Or Eleanor Wake在英國諾福爾可索普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1304年在英國，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特梅爾可姆 霍爾。

nameMeanings.name: Bingham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset) and Irish (County Mayo): habitational name from Bingham (Nottinghamshire). The placename is probably from an Old English folk-name Bynningas (‘the people associated with a man named Bynna’), or possibly from an unattested Old English word bing ‘a kettle-shaped hollow’, + Old English hām ‘homestead’.
Irish (Ulster, of Scottish origin): altered form of   Bigham  .
American shortened and altered form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames such as   Bingenheimer  .

variants.name: Ingham
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from any of the places called Ingham, particularly in Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Suffolk. The placename is from the Old English personal name Inga + hām ‘homestead’. In Yorkshire this name was sometimes confused with Bingham in the 18th century.
English (of Norman origin): variant of the obsolete Norman surname Engaine; see Gain .

variants.name: Bigham
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire) and Irish: habitational name from either Bigholm in Beith parish (Ayrshire) or Bigholms in Langholm parish (Dumfriesshire). The second element of the placename is from Older Scots holm (Old Norse holmr) ‘islet’, ‘raised land in a marsh’, ‘a stretch of low-lying land beside a river; a meadow’. The first element may be an unattested Older Scots bigge, a shortened form of bigging ‘building’. The name was taken to Ulster in the 17th and 18th centuries, where it was used interchangeably with Bingham .

variants.name: Bingenheimer
meanings: German and Jewish (from Germany): habitational name for someone from Bingenheim on the Eder river (Hesse). Compare   Bingham  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Bingham was born after 1230, in Melcombe Regis, Dorset, England, his father, Bishop Robert Bingham, was 8835 and his mother, Lucy Turberville, was 8805. He married Emma Or Eleanor Wake about 1260, in Thorpe, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1304, in England, and was buried in Melcombe Horsey, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Bingham est né après 1230, à Melcombe Regis, Dorset, Angleterre, son père, Bishop Robert Bingham, avait 8835 ans et sa mère, Lucy Turberville, avait 8805 ans. Il a épousé Emma Or Eleanor Wake environ 1260, à Thorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1304, à Angleterre, et a été enterré à Melcombe Horsey, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Bingham(이)가 1230년 이후 영국 도르세트 멜코브 레지스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bishop Robert Bingham(은)는 8835세였고, 그의 어머니 Lucy Turberville(은)는 8805세였다. 그는 대략 1260년 영국 노르폴크 소에서 Emma Or Eleanor Wake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1304년 영국에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 멜코브 호르시에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Emma Or Eleanor Wake aproximadamente 1260, em Thorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Bingham родился после 1230 г. в местности мелкомб регис, дорсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Bishop Robert Bingham было 8835 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucy Turberville, 8805. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma Or Eleanor Wake около 1260 г. в местности таурп, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1304 г. в местности Англия и был похоронен в местности мелкомб хаурси, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
